case_title: DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. COMPETENT BUILDERS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COMPETENT BUILDERS CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMPETENT BUILDERS CORPORATION $138,060.40 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $138,060.40, INCLUDING: WAGES OF $47,455.20, LIQUIDATED DAMAGES OF $47,455.20 AND PENALTIES OF $43,150.00. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
